nasb.text: It will be a day when they will come to you From Assyria and the cities of Egypt, From Egypt even to the Euphrates, Even from sea to sea and mountain to mountain.

esv.text: In that day they will come to you, from Assyria and the cities of Egypt, and from Egypt to the River, from sea to sea and from mountain to mountain.

cnv.text: 那日，必有人來歸你， 從亞述到埃及， 從埃及到大河， 從這海到那海，從這山到那山，必有人來歸你。

ccb.text: 那日，从亚述到埃及的各城， 从埃及到幼发拉底河， 从天涯到海角， 人们都要到你这里来。
